instruction: Add an optional `min_length` parameter (default `1`). Only count a contiguous True segment when its length is at least `min_length`. Raise `ValueError` with a descriptive message when `min_length < 1`. With `min_length=1`, all segments are counted and the result is identical to the original function. All other behaviour (traversing the flags list, returning 0 for empty or all-False input) must remain unchanged.
